horoscope: With a Mars-Uranus alignment influencing the day, dear Aries, you can experience a strong need to do things differently. Areas where you’ve felt restricted can be harder to take. This transit can bring temperamental energy, but it also awakens a need for improvement and progress. This meeting occurs in your solar third house, pointing to stimulating and exciting discussions, personal interests, transportation, news, or developments with studies and learning. You’re expressing your independence and enterprising spirit. News can come that steers you onto a new, hopefully improved or upgraded course. However, desires might be fleeting, making it better to watch for pouring too much energy into something that may later lose your interest. Consider that hasty communications can be disruptive, not always in a good way. Fortunately, with some care, this can be a time to put a problem behind you. Actions now could also activate a matter related to friendship or happiness goals, and the objective is to shake things up just enough to freshen up your life or improve your journey.

With Mars and Uranus heading into alignment in your resources sector, dear Taurus, there can be sudden and interesting developments with your belongings, income, budget, assets, or talents. An unexpected desire to buy something unusual or to develop and do something with a talent can be in the spotlight now. This transit gives you a burst of energy that you should use wisely and mindfully. You might break free from a constraint or put a dysfunctional project or attitude behind you. Getting rid of something that was a burden for you can figure strongly now, and it can be a relief. Events remind you that your approaches to business and money-making need an overhaul, sparking a desire to innovate. If you’ve been over-attached to certain personal possessions, you might now recognize how they’ve weighed you down. While you may want to tame impulses to spend that come on too suddenly, circumstances are pushing you into new directions. It’s a better time to act than react. Aim to be courageous but not risk-taking for the best results.

Mars is heading into alignment with Uranus in your sign today, dear Gemini, and you can be feeling quite riled up, ready to handle a matter, or put something behind you. With this transit, your need for more personal freedoms and authentic self-expression is intense. Do watch for slapdash or rash outbursts and decisions that force an issue now. Be the one in charge by honoring your heart rather than reacting with your ego. This Mars-Uranus conjunction encourages you to take on the world, and changes in plans or directions are likely. If you focus on making improvements rather than grand gestures or big moves, you'll more thoroughly enjoy your week. You may be at your most impulsive now, and it's important not to be reactive, which is how to work towards true independence. You may get some help from a friendship.

Mars and Uranus are heading together in your privacy sector, dear Cancer, potentially opening up a can of worms! Something unusual or unexpected may occur today, nudging you forward. A problem may crop up involving a loose end left behind. Impulses are strong, and desires can come on with great force, and they're likely to do with something private or behind closed doors. Consider consequences, but if you need to break out of a bad habit or a frustrating circumstance, this electric energy might give you the push to do so. Matters that erupt seemingly out of nowhere are actually rooted in issues that you have buried and haven't yet confronted or resolved. Resentment you thought was behind you can now re-emerge, for example. It's a fine time for a sudden, inspired effort on a behind-the-scenes project or endeavor. A career or reputation matter can also rev up now.

Mars and Uranus are heading into alignment, dear Leo, and this configuration in your social sector points to interesting developments, excitement, or new approaches with friends, projects, and plans. A bold new idea or plan for the future can result. The emphasis is on doing something new with friends or changes in how you interact. You’re in great shape for the motivation or push to improve a friendship, social situation, or long-term happiness pursuit. A breakthrough plan or action can be in the spotlight, getting the ball rolling. An exciting new experience may be just what you need to keep things fresh. This can also be a time when you discover that to move forward more freely and happily, you must let go of an attitude that’s kept you down. At the same time, it’s better to act mindfully, which is the key to true independence, rather than react to the world around you, which keeps you beholden to others.

Mars is heading into alignment with Uranus today, dear Virgo, bringing exciting, electric energy to your world. While this alignment occurs approximately every two years, it’s the first time this configuration happens in your solar tenth house, and it serves as a prompt to change, shake up, or begin a life path or career project. The desire–or the need–to break free from situations that limit you is difficult to ignore right now. Still, it’s important to remember that it can be challenging to distinguish between what’s an impulse and what’s your intuition. Aim for mindfulness and self-knowledge, perhaps by tuning out distractions to connect with your true needs. This can certainly be a time to rock the boat or dare to do things a little differently. It’s a time for innovation and progress, but this journey of becoming a freer spirit shouldn’t be rushed. A career breakthrough or a change in responsibilities may be in the works. This week is about connecting with a need to make changes that ultimately empower you.

Mars heads into alignment with Uranus today, dear Libra, stirring strong desires to do something outside of your routine. You may want to make a stand, bravely follow a passion, or achieve a breakthrough. A change of direction can be informative, although also a little disruptive. There could be changes to an educational path, belief system, or mental focus and attitude. If you’ve been connecting with your true needs, this can be a time to make changes to live more freely and authentically. A new way of thinking or belief system may even emerge. An impulse to explore, discover, and learn can come on strongly, as this transit seems to demand that you stretch yourself mentally or push past fear. A relationship matter can rev up instead. New opportunities can emerge, but it’s also a time of strong desires and whims. If you’re not mindful, you could be tempted to make abrupt moves. It’s also a time when you can feel particularly restless as you crave more life experience and freedom of movement.

This week can stir up all sorts of interesting feelings and desires, dear Scorpio, particularly in areas where you've felt confined, held back, or restricted. Changes or stirrings can occur with your intimate life, financial situation, or support as Mars and Uranus head into alignment in your solar eighth house. The desire to clear up excess debt, whether material or psychic, and to get rid of excess baggage, in general, can come on strongly. You might muster up the courage to make meaningful changes, but it's important to distinguish between impulse and intuition. Reacting keeps you tied to others in uncomfortable ways, while taking action puts you in charge of your life. Positively, letting go of something that has already expired or outgrown its usefulness can lead to a real sense of liberation, especially if you free yourself from a destructive habit or circumstance. However, this is very impulsive energy, and it's best to watch for surprises or sudden moves. Life seems to speed up, and tempers or rash actions are more likely than usual.

Mars and Uranus are heading into alignment in your solar seventh house, dear Sagittarius. While this transit happens about every two years, it’s the first one of several to occur in your solar sector of partnerships. This transit can force an issue or create fireworks, as it’s ready to shake up the status quo! You might awaken to a plan, a mission, or greater bravery to handle a problem once and for all. New developments in a relationship can demand new approaches. Your goal at this time should be to make changes that help you live more authentically. You shouldn’t feel at the mercy of others’ unreliability, and you might recognize this now. At the same time, expecting the unexpected with people might be wise. An assertion of independence or courage to make connections can be in the spotlight. Since Uranus rules your communication sector and Mars your creativity and leisure sector, you may want to take action in these areas. Unpacking your needs and wants can be integral to improving your relationships. The possibility of following a whim is real now, although it’s best not to be too impulsive unless you already know your heart.

You may want to pull yourself out of a rut or an outdated pattern today, dear Capricorn, as Mars and Uranus head into alignment. This connection occurs in your work and health sector, an area of your solar chart that rules routines, habits, chores, and your day job. It’s there to stir things up, especially those things that no longer serve you a good purpose. It’s an unpredictable transit, but you can also aim to be in charge by getting in better touch with what needs to change, and then take the reins! The motivation to change how you do your chores, work, health, or habits can come on suddenly. It can be exciting, especially if you watch for impulsiveness or flaring tempers. Aim to use this spark of energy to correct conditions that hold you back from achieving good health and habits or from more fully enjoying your daily life, including your chores. You might instead break through a financial or domestic block. This transit demands a new or innovative approach, not necessarily an abrupt or extreme change. It can be a time of bold solutions and methods.

With Mars and Uranus meeting in your sector of joy, dear Aquarius, it’s a time to do things just a little differently to freshen up your life. Having fun and enjoying or expressing yourself is good for the soul, and today you might expect the unexpected as you indulge in new, different, or unusual whims, attractions, activities, or pleasures. Certainly, this transit can also stir up unrest, but it’s a good time to take charge and make improvements. It can be a time of sudden motivation to express yourself in unique ways or break free from a confining situation or label. There may be a make-or-break situation, and it’s best to avoid unnecessary risks. Aiming to act from the heart rather than merely react or respond to changing circumstances can help you make the most of this energy. Rebelliousness is not likely to serve you well, but making courageous changes can work to your advantage. A powerful desire to change direction might relate to your personal interests and connections.

This week can sometimes feel a little unpredictable or exciting, dear Pisces, as a Mars-Uranus alignment awakens a need for change and innovation. This transit occurs in your home and family sector this time around, and improving your domestic world or living conditions/arrangements can be the theme, especially if you’ve felt confined or restrained in these areas. If outdated domestic routines or ties have weighed you down, they can be harder to take now. This energy is also about your finances and feelings of comfort and privacy. Sudden desires to change direction can be powerful. Be cautious about making abrupt changes if desires arise too quickly, but it can be wise to stay flexible and open to new methods for handling old problems. This transit can indicate a breakthrough moment or turning point, and the goal should be to express yourself more authentically and freely. For the very best results, aim to curb the tendency to react impulsively or immaturely.
